mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(wo.doc_no) AS count FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info wo JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = wo.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(wo.write_year, wo.doc_no) AND ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND ai.param = 'writer' WHERE wo.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND wo.use_yn = 'Y' /* 특정 기간내 조회시 주석 해제 */ AND wo.reg_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- :start_date, end_date

WITH worker_opinions AS ( -- 근로자의견 목록 기준 데이터 조회 SELECT wo.write_year, wo.doc_type, wo.doc_no, wo.reg_dt, wo.worker_opinion, -- nullable wo.workplace_id, -- nullable wp.workplace_nm, -- nullable wo.created_at FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info wo LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info wp ON wp.comp_id = wo.comp_id AND wp.workplace_id = wo.workplace_id AND wp.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE wo.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id
AND wo.write_year = #{year} -- :write_year
AND wo.use_yn = 'Y' ), participants AS ( -- 서명자 정보 조회 SELECT wo.write_year, wo.doc_type, wo.doc_no, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS writer_hr_id, -- nullable MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS writer_signed, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_hr_id, -- nullable MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reviewer_signed FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN worker_opinions wo ON ai.target_type = wo.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(wo.write_year, wo.doc_no) GROUP BY wo.write_year, wo.doc_type, wo.doc_no ) SELECT -- 근로자의견 목록 조회 질의 본문 CONCAT(wo.write_year, '-', wo.doc_type, '-', wo.doc_no) AS id, wo.worker_opinion AS content, CASE WHEN wo.workplace_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object ( 'id', wo.workplace_id, 'name', wo.workplace_nm ) ELSE NULL END AS workplace, CASE WHEN p.writer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.writer_hr_id, 'name', p.writer_name, 'jobTitle', p.writer_job_title, 'orgName', p.writer_org_name, 'signed', p.writer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS writer, CASE WHEN p.reviewer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.reviewer_hr_id, 'name', p.reviewer_name, 'jobTitle', p.reviewer_job_title, 'orgName', p.reviewer_org_name, 'signed', p.reviewer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS reviewer, TO_TIMESTAMP(wo.reg_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp AS registrationDate, wo.created_at AS createdAt FROM worker_opinions wo JOIN participants p ON wo.write_year = p.write_year AND wo.doc_type = p.doc_type AND wo.doc_no = p.doc_no /* only_mine이 TRUE 일때 조건부 쿼리 활성화 필요*/
WHERE p.writer_hr_id = #{hrId} OR p.reviewer_hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id
ORDER BY wo.reg_dt DESC, wo.created_at DESC

WITH worker_opinion AS ( -- 근로자의견 기준 데이터 조회 SELECT wo.write_year, wo.doc_type, wo.doc_no, wo.reg_dt, wo.worker_opinion, wo.reviewer_opinion, wo.workplace_id, wp.workplace_nm, wo.created_at FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info wo LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info wp ON wp.comp_id = wo.comp_id AND wp.workplace_id = wo.workplace_id AND wp.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE wo.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND wo.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND wo.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND wo.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND wo.use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ), participants AS ( -- 서명자 정보 조회 SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS writer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_org_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN ai.updated_at ELSE NULL END) AS writer_signed_at, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS writer_signed, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_org_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN ai.updated_at ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_signed_at, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reviewer_signed FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN worker_opinion wo ON ai.target_type = wo.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(wo.write_year, wo.doc_no) GROUP BY wo.write_year, wo.doc_type, wo.doc_no ), experiences AS ( SELECT json_agg( json_build_object( 'id', CONCAT(we.write_year, '-', we.doc_type, '-', we.doc_no, '-', we.reg_dt, '-', we.experience_no), 'content', we.content ) ) AS experiences FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_experience we JOIN worker_opinion wo ON wo.write_year = we.write_year AND wo.doc_type = we.doc_type AND wo.doc_no = we.doc_no AND we.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY wo.write_year, wo.doc_type, wo.doc_no ) SELECT -- 근로자의견 목록 조회 질의 본문 CONCAT(wo.write_year, '-', wo.doc_type, '-', wo.doc_no) AS id, wo.worker_opinion AS content, wo.reviewer_opinion AS reviewer_content, CASE WHEN wo.workplace_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'id', wo.workplace_id, 'name', wo.workplace_nm ) ELSE NULL END AS workplace, CASE WHEN p.writer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.writer_hr_id, 'name', p.writer_name, 'jobTitle', p.writer_job_title, 'orgName', p.writer_org_name, 'profileImageId', (SELECT file_id FROM esg.tb_sys_file WHERE target_type = 'hrImg' AND target_id = p.writer_hr_id AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1), 'signed', p.writer_signed, 'signedAt', p.writer_signed_at ) ELSE NULL END AS writer, CASE WHEN p.reviewer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.reviewer_hr_id, 'name', p.reviewer_name, 'jobTitle', p.reviewer_job_title, 'orgName', p.reviewer_org_name, 'profileImageId', (SELECT file_id FROM esg.tb_sys_file WHERE target_type = 'hrImg' AND target_id = p.reviewer_hr_id AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1), 'signed', p.reviewer_signed, 'signedAt', p.reviewer_signed_at ) ELSE NULL END AS reviewer, TO_TIMESTAMP(wo.reg_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp AS registrationDate, COALESCE(e.experiences, '[]'::json) AS experiences, wo.created_at AS createdAt FROM worker_opinion wo LEFT JOIN participants p ON TRUE LEFT JOIN experiences e ON TRUE
mapper.update: WITH workers_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ), my_user_info AS ( SELECT user_id, signature FROM esg.v_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND signature IS NOT NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = (SELECT signature FROM my_user_info), updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = (SELECT user_id FROM my_user_info) WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_no AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM workers_exists) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM my_user_info)

WITH workers_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ) UPDATE esg.tb_approval_info SET signature = null, updated_at = null, updated_by = null WHERE target_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) -- :writer_year, :doc_type AND hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND param = #{type} -- :type 서명 타입 (company, partner, employee, writer, reviewer, approver) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM workers_exists)
mapper.insert: WITH workers_exists AS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ) INSERT INTO esg.tb_approval_info ( target_type, target_id, hr_id, param, created_at, created_by, hr_nm, orgn_nm, jbrp_nm ) SELECT #{docType}, CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}), #{reviewerHrId}, 'reviewer', NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{hrNm}, #{orgnNm}, #{jbrpNm} WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM workers_exists)

INSERT INTO esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, reg_dt, comp_id, hr_id, workplace_id, worker_opinion, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, 'WOOHA', (select COALESCE(LPAD(TRIM(TO_CHAR(MAX(doc_no)::INTEGER + 1, '99999')), 5, '0'), '00001') from esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info WHERE write_year = TO_CHAR(now(), 'YYYY') AND doc_type = 'WOOHA'), REPLACE(#{regDt},'.',''), #{compId}, #{hrId}, #{workplaceId}, #{content}, 'Y', now(), #{createdBy} ) RETURNING doc_no

update.foreach: UPDATE esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_experience SET content = #{experience.content}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{riskReportsSaveVO.updatedBy} WHERE write_year = split_part(#{experience.id}, '-', 1) AND doc_type = split_part(split_part(#{experience.id}, '-', 2), '-', 1) AND doc_no = split_part(split_part(#{experience.id}, '-', 3), '-', 1) AND reg_dt = split_part(split_part(#{experience.id}, '-', 4), '-', 1) AND experience_no = split_part(#{experience.id}, '-', 5)

delete.foreach: DELETE FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_experience WHERE write_year = split_part(#{id}, '-', 1) AND doc_type = split_part(split_part(#{id}, '-', 2), '-', 1) AND doc_no = split_part(split_part(#{id}, '-', 3), '-', 1) AND reg_dt = split_part(split_part(#{id}, '-', 4), '-', 1) AND experience_no = split_part(#{id}, '-', 5)

mapper.delete: DELETE FROM esg.tb_approval_info WHERE target_type = #{docType} AND target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) AND param = 'reviewer'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_approval_info ( target_type, target_id, hr_id, param, created_at, created_by, hr_nm, orgn_nm, jbrp_nm ) SELECT #{docType}, CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}), #{hrId}, #{type}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, h.hr_nm, o.orgn_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm FROM esg.v_hr_info h LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info o ON h.orgn_id = o.orgn_id AND o.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND o.use_yn = 'Y' left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = h.jbrp AND jbrp.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE h.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO esg.tb_approval_info ( target_type, target_id, hr_id, param, created_at, created_by, hr_nm, orgn_nm, jbrp_nm ) SELECT #{docType}, CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}), #{reviewerHrId}, #{type}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, h.hr_nm, o.orgn_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm FROM esg.v_hr_info h LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info o ON h.orgn_id = o.orgn_id AND o.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND o.use_yn = 'Y' left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = h.jbrp AND jbrp.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE h.hr_id = #{reviewerHrId} -- :hr_id LIMIT 1
